item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rashi Peripherals Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 484.5
item.description: With a remarkable 62.79% gain over the past year, Rashi Peripherals Ltd has surged to a fresh 52-week high of Rs 484.5, underscoring a powerful momentum driven by a confluence of technical indicators and robust price action. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Indian Overseas Bank Reports Very Positive Quarterly Financial Performance Amid Margin Expansion
item.description: Indian Overseas Bank (IOB) has demonstrated a marked improvement in its financial performance for the quarter ended March 2026, prompting an upgrade in its financial trend from positive to very positive. Key metrics such as net interest income, profit after tax, and asset quality have reached record levels, signalling a robust turnaround for the public sector lender amid a challenging banking environment. Time: 20 minutes ago

item.title: Sensex and Nifty Advance as FMCG Leads; Mixed Midcap and Smallcap Trends Mark Market Session
item.description: Indian equity markets closed higher on 29 Apr 2026, with the Sensex gaining 609.45 points (0.79%) to settle at 77,496.36 and the Nifty rising 181.95 points (0.76%) to 24,177.65. The rally was led by large caps, particularly the FMCG sector, while utilities lagged amid mixed global cues and cautious investor sentiment ahead of key corporate earnings. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Edges Lower as Select Stocks Show Divergent Trends
item.description: The BSE Midcap 150 index closed almost flat on 29 Apr 2026, registering a marginal decline of 0.01%, reflecting a day of cautious trading amid mixed sectoral performances. While some mid-cap stocks delivered robust returns, others faced pressure, resulting in a balanced advance-decline ratio and a nuanced market breadth. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Shows Resilient Gains Amid Mixed Market Breadth
item.description: The small-cap segment, represented by the BSE SMALLCAP 250 index, has demonstrated steady resilience with a modest gain of 0.54% on the day and a more robust 1.29% increase over the past five trading sessions. This performance underscores the segment’s growing appeal amid a cautiously optimistic market environment, supported by selective sectoral strength and encouraging breadth indicators. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Mixed Momentum as Vedanta Leads Gains and Power Finance Lags
item.description: The large-cap segment demonstrated a cautiously optimistic tone on 29 Apr 2026, with the BSE 100 index edging higher by 0.6% amid a backdrop of mixed sectoral performances. Vedanta emerged as the standout performer, delivering a robust 4.61% return, while Power Finance Corporation struggled, posting a decline of 3.49%. The advance-decline ratio of 56 advancing stocks to 44 decliners, translating to a 1.27x ratio, underscores a market environment marked by selective buying and defensive positioning. Time: 21 minutes ago

item.title: Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd Surges 7.24% to Day's High of Rs 1325 — Outperforms Sector by 6.68 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.79% on 29 Apr 2026, yet Pondy Oxides & Chemicals Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.24% gain, reaching an intraday high of Rs 1325. This 6.68-percentage-point outperformance over its sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 35 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Rajvi Logitrade Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 15.85
item.description: With a decisive surge to Rs 15.85 on 29 Apr 2026, Rajvi Logitrade Ltd has reached a fresh 52-week high, marking a 33.76% gain over the past year and outpacing the Sensex’s decline of 3.48%. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum in the micro-cap transport services stock. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Ceigall India Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 345
item.description: With a decisive intraday surge to Rs 345, Ceigall India Ltd has reached a new 52-week high, marking a 30.64% gain over the past year and outperforming the Sensex by nearly 34 percentage points. This milestone reflects a strong alignment of technical indicators and sustained price momentum that has propelled the stock well above its key moving averages. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Sizemasters Technology Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 377.55
item.description: With a remarkable surge to Rs 377.55 on 29 Apr 2026, Sizemasters Technology Ltd has reached a new 52-week and all-time high, propelled by a confluence of strong technical signals and sustained price momentum. Time: 45 minutes ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 608
item.description: Surging to an intraday peak of Rs 608 on 29 Apr 2026, Himadri Speciality Chemical Ltd has marked a significant milestone by hitting a fresh 52-week high. This achievement caps a seven-day winning streak that has propelled the stock up by 22.56%, outpacing its sector by 4.49% on the day and delivering a robust 29.87% return over the past year against the Sensex’s decline of 3.48%. Time: 46 minutes ago

item.title: Rajvi Logitrade Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 15.85 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Rajvi Logitrade Ltd, a player in the Transport Services sector, achieved a landmark by reaching its all-time high stock price of Rs.15.85 on 29 April 2026. This milestone reflects the company’s robust performance and sustained upward momentum in the market, outperforming key benchmarks and demonstrating strong financial and technical credentials. Time: 48 minutes ago

item.title: MTAR Technologies Ltd Surges 7.65% to Day's High of Rs 5703.15 — Outperforms Sector by 8.28 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.74% on 29 Apr 2026, yet MTAR Technologies Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.65% gain, touching a new 52-week and all-time high of Rs 5703.15. This 8.28-percentage-point outperformance over its Aerospace & Defense sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Apar Industries Ltd Surges 5.16% to Day's High of Rs 12450 — Outperforms Sector by 5.07 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.74% on 29 Apr 2026, yet Apar Industries Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 5.16% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 12,450. This 5.07 percentage-point outperformance over its sector signals a distinctly stock-specific momentum shift rather than a general market uplift. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: AVI Polymers Leads Micro Cap Rally with 238.44% Return in Six Months
item.description: AVI Polymers has emerged as the standout performer among micro cap stocks over the past six months, delivering an extraordinary return of 238.44%, significantly outpacing benchmark indices and sector peers. This remarkable surge reflects a combination of robust financials, bullish technical indicators, and attractive valuation metrics that have captured investor attention in a challenging market environment. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Covance Softsol Leads Market Rally with Exceptional 2667% Return in One Year
item.description: Covance Softsol, a micro-cap player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, has delivered an extraordinary return of 2667.46% over the past year, vastly outperforming its peers and benchmark indices. This remarkable surge underscores the stock’s strong fundamentals, attractive valuation, and positive technical outlook, making it a standout performer in a challenging market environment. Time: 50 minutes ago

item.title: Sizemasters Technology Ltd Hits All-Time High of Rs 377.55 as Momentum Builds Across Timeframes
item.description: Extending its remarkable rally, Sizemasters Technology Ltd surged 2.00% on 29 Apr 2026 to close at a fresh all-time high of Rs 377.55, outpacing the Sensex gain of 0.78% and trading well above all key moving averages. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: India Glycols Ltd Surges 7.3% to Day's High of Rs 1041.55 — Outperforms Sector by 7.34 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex rose 0.76% on 29 Apr 2026, yet India Glycols Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.3% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 1041.55. This 7.34 percentage-point outperformance over its Commodity Chemicals sector peers signals a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Elantas Beck India Ltd Surges 7.03% to Day's High of Rs 10,190 — Outperforms Sector by 5.73 Percentage Points
item.description: The Sensex advanced 0.81% on 29 Apr 2026, yet Elantas Beck India Ltd outpaced the broader market with a 7.03% gain, touching an intraday high of Rs 10,190. This 5.73 percentage-point outperformance over the Specialty Chemicals sector highlights a distinctly stock-specific rally rather than a market-wide lift. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Broad-Based Technical Strength Lifts Apar Industries Ltd to 52-Week High of Rs 12,335
item.description: Surging past its previous peaks, Apar Industries Ltd touched a new 52-week high of Rs 12,335 on 29 Apr 2026, marking a remarkable 120.04% gain over the past year. This milestone comes amid a backdrop of strong technical momentum and sustained market outperformance. Time: 1 hour ago
